Class UwfEngineClientHooks

java.lang.Object
ai.vextura.uwf_engine.hooks.UwfEngineClientHooks
public class UwfEngineClientHooks extends Object
UwfEngineClient lifecycle hooks — customize behavior per operation. This file is protected and will NOT be overwritten by vexctl sdk generate. Override methods here to add logging, metrics, validation, etc.
